title: oncostylis tenella
intro: Oncostylis tenella is a plant species that belongs to the family Rutaceae and is commonly found in the eastern regions of Australia. The medicinal properties of this plant are attributed to its essential oils and bioactive compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Oncostylis tenella include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Oncostylis tenella are typically dried and used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
